display.purpose: Dashboard landing, big callouts, status boards.

body.purpose: Chat logs, data grids, configuration panels.

shadows.name: neon-cyan-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus rings and selected container highlights.

shadows.name: neon-pink-glow
shadows.purpose: Alerts, critical notifications, and badge triggers.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Smooth, snappy transitions for active and hovered components.

components.name: Primary Neon Button
components.description: Cyan button with quick keyboard shortcut indicator.
components.css: .ds-btn-neon-primary { background: #00f3ff; color: #0a0e17; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-btn-neon-primary:hover { background: #5effff; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 243, 255, 0.4); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-neon-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-kbd { background: rgba(10, 14, 23, 0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(10, 14, 23, 0.2); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #0a0e17; }

components.name: Keyboard Shortcut Tooltip (KBD)
components.description: Small floating or inline indicators showing keyboard triggers.
components.css: .ds-kbd-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #121824; border: 1px solid #1e293b; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-kbd-key { background: #0a0e17; border: 1px solid #1e293b; color: #94a3b8; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-kbd-label { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Vibrant Chat Input
components.description: Dark text input that glows cyan on active focus.
components.html: Enter
components.css: .ds-input-container { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; } .ds-input-neon { width: 100%; background: #121824; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 64px 12px 16px; color: #f8fafc; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input-neon::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input-neon:focus { border-color: #00f3ff; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 243, 255, 0.2); } .ds-kbd-action { position: absolute; right: 12px; background: #0a0e17; border: 1px solid #1e293b; color: #94a3b8; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }

components.name: Command Palette Row
components.html:
⚡ Assign to AI Auto-Reply
⌘A
components.css: .ds-command-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #121824; border: 1px solid #1e293b; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); width: 100%; max-width: 400px; } .ds-command-row:hover { background: #1a2234; border-color: #00f3ff; } .ds-command-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-command-icon { font-size: 16px; } .ds-command-text { color: #f8fafc; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-kbd-key { background: #0a0e17; border: 1px solid #1e293b; color: #94a3b8; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }

narrative.overview: Smart Customer Core is a high-velocity workspace designed for modern operations agents who manage high-frequency WhatsApp conversations. The UI rejects the dry, sterile light-mode look of traditional corporate CRMs in favor of a sleek, dark console that reduces eye strain, maintains high focus, and feels like a modern developer tool or high-end game client.
keyCharacteristics: Neon Dark Aesthetic: Tinted space-navy backgrounds paired with sharp, glowing cybernetic accents.
Shortcuts-First Interaction: Visible keyboard shortcuts on every button, tab, and menu element.
Instant Response Feel: Micro-animations and transitions keep the UI feeling fast and reactive.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Vibrant Cyan and Hot Pink accent colors must collectively occupy less than 10% of the screen area. They are used purely for guidance, focus states, and indicators. The canvas must remain restful and clean.

rules.name: The Space Navy Tint Rule
rules.body: Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#ffffff). All dark surfaces are tinted with space navy to create depth and cohesion.

rules.name: The KBD-Visibility Rule
rules.body: Every shortcut must be rendered in a distinct, monospaced `kbd` block (e.g. `[K]`) using JetBrains Mono, styled with a subtle border and background to stand out clearly as a keyboard trigger.

rules.name: The Interactive Elevation Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never float or have shadows at rest. Shadow is a dynamic response to user hover or focus state, manifesting as a cybernetic glow.

dos: Do provide visual keyboard shortcut indicators (kbd tags) directly beside every interactive control.
Do use cyber cyan (#00f3ff) for primary action states and focus indicators.
Do enforce a strict dark mode using space navy tints for all background levels.
Do respect user reduced motion preferences by setting animation transition times to 0s when requested.
donts: Don't use standard side-stripe borders as indicators on list items or chat previews. Use full border transitions or background highlights.
Don't implement slow, multi-stage overlays when inline commands or shortcuts could perform the operation immediately.
Don't use neon colors as text colors on light backgrounds, ensuring all interactions meet WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines.
Don't use generic black-and-white scales; maintain the space navy brand tint throughout the dashboard.
